scripts.test: pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/content-sync test && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/private-wiki-index test && pnpm sync:content && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/blog test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/content-sync build && pnpm sync:content && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/private-wiki-index build && pnpm index:private && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/blog build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/content-sync typecheck && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/private-wiki-index typecheck && pnpm sync:content && pnpm --filter @dahm-blog/blog typecheck
